rulings.Case Title: LARRY CHEW VS. CHASE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Motion To Vacate Tentative Ruling And Order Sustaining Defts Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 4. Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Motion To Vacate Tentative Ruling And Order Sustaining Defts Demurrer. Defense motion to strike granted. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY CHEW VS. CHASE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Vacate Tentative Ruling And Order Sustaining Defendant'S Demurrer To Plaintiff; Third Amended Complaint;Request For Trial And Continuance For The Hiring Of Attorney As Order By Court At Hearing On 2-6-12.
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 4. Motion To Vacate Tentative Ruling And Order Sustaining Defendant'S Demurrer To Plaintiff; Third Amended Complaint; Request For Trial And Continuance For The Hiring Of Attorney As Order By Court At Hearing On 2-6-12. Deny. "Motion to Vacate" denied giving moving party most favorable view the court considers the motion as 1) CCP 1008 to reconsider which moving party failed to meet and or 2) CCP 473b which he also failed to meet. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY VERKHOLAZ et al VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Jp Morgan Chase Bank And California Reconveyance Company'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 5. Defendants Jp Morgan Chase Bank And California Reconveyance Company'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Complaint. Overrule, as to 1st cause of action - allegations presumed true not contradicted by Judicially noticed documents; Gomes v. Countrywide inapposite. Sustain with leave to amend as to 2nd and 4th causes of action. Sustain without leave to amend as to 3rd cause of action. Injunctive relief rememdy not cause of action. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELCOME HOME RENTAL PROPERTIES, INC. VS. STEVE HOLT et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF WELCOME HOME RENTAL PROPERTIES, INC.'s Motion For Attorney'S Fees. Grant attorney's fees in the amount of $6941.50. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. LUCILA MEDINA-GONZALEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Terminating Sanction As To Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Randall Naiman
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 6. PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion For Terminating Sanction As To Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Hearing required. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TRUSTEE, FOR CARRINGTON VS. MARTA GUTIERREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT LENA VENEGAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TUNG LING SHIAO VS. JULIE HALLGREN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Otion To Be Declaared Prevailint Party And For Reasonable Attorneeys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 8, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT JULIE HALLGREN's Moion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorneeys Fees. Grant. Court finds notice in tort or at least tort and contract, therefore defendant prevailing party and granted attorney fees of $6841.25 plus costs of $1067.60. (501/REQ)
